content.en:
Ye Tian agreed, making these high-level realm gods nod slightly.

Subsequently.

The top forces represented by the Eastern Wu Ancient Sect began to let those powerful mid-level realm gods come out of the East Wu Realm Seam Realm, and they were not allowed to continue to stay in the East Wu Realm Seam Realm.

Of course.

These mid-level realm gods can also choose to continue to stay in the realm of the East Wu Realm Gap and choose to hide, so that they don't have to come out.

However, once they did this, the ancient city of the Eastern Black Realm Gap Realm would not accept these mid-level realm gods, and they would not be able to come back even if they were injured, and the final result would most likely be a fall.

Therefore, once the top forces expel them, they dare not hide, so they can only choose to come out.

Not long after, the powerful middle-level realm gods of the Eastern Wu Realm came out of the Crack Realm of the Eastern Wu Realm, and among them were many of the middle-level realm gods who had been severely injured and healed.

......

This time, those powerful forces in the Dongwu Realm have suffered heavy losses, but almost all of the mid-level realm gods who survived have gained, and the harvest is not bad, among them, a very small number of middle-level realm gods who have cultivated at the peak of the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm have also gained some opportunities that will help them break through.

It can be said that in the future, these powerful forces will really be able to cultivate a few high-level realm gods!

However, the Dongwu Realm has lost a lot of powerful forces this time, and three of them have directly fallen into the ranks of powerful forces and become medium forces, and the other powerful forces have also weakened a lot, and the overall power has dropped significantly.

Even if they get the resources, it will still be difficult to recover in a short period of time, and it will take a long time to regain their strength.

This time, the real winner is naturally Ye Tian.

He has obtained too many resources, and he has also made a breakthrough in the cultivation of his wife and children, and his combat effectiveness has skyrocketed, which is incomparable to other forces.

Of course.

Ye Tian was not arrogant, he was still very low-key, after all, the current strength of the human race could only be equivalent to the weaker top forces, and the Dongwu Realm was only one of the many realms in the Realm God Realm, which was not worth mentioning at all.

In the blink of an eye, another long time has passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already slaughtered all sides in the Crack Realm of the Eastern Wu Realm, causing huge losses to the demon seeds.

Those high-level demon seeds besieged Ye Tian again and again, but in a place like the Eastern Black Realm Crack Realm, the strength of the high-level demon seeds was suppressed too ruthlessly, causing them to not be able to besiege Ye Tian at all, but instead lost again and again.

In this regard, Ye Tian was very happy, the more high-level demon seeds that came, the better, so that he could kill more high-level demon seeds and get more resources.

......

Time flies.

this day.

Ye Tian found that the resources of the Eastern Wu Realm Gap Realm were suddenly much less, as if those resources had disappeared, which made him very puzzled.

Thereupon.

He went to ask the gods of the other top powers, and he quickly got answers.

Zuo Xu Realm God told Ye Tian: "Ye Heaven Realm God, the resources of the Eastern Wu Realm Seam Realm will indeed be born quickly, far faster than the speed at which resources are born from the outside world, so the resources here are inexhaustible, but it is not always like this. Every once in a while, there is a period of silence. In the period of silence, the speed at which resources are born is about the same as that of the outside world, and this period of time is also the time for the realm of the rift to recover. Therefore, we will not continue to look for resources during this period of time, otherwise it will be a waste of time. "

"I see!"

In addition, he also learned from Zuo Xu's Realm God that the silent period of the Boundary Gap Realm was completely irregular, and no one knew when the silent period would come.

Knowing that the quiet period is coming so soon, the top forces will not be so tough to drive away those powerful forces, and will let them stay until now, and then let the other party leave (affh), so that the powerful forces will not have too many thoughts of resistance and resistance.

After the silent period of the East Wu Realm Seam Realm arrived, the top forces were a little relieved, and a large number of realm gods came out of the East Wu Realm Seam Realm and began to cultivate silently.

During this period of time, they will do their best to cultivate middle-level realm gods, as well as high-level realm gods.

Because the quiet period will not be short, these top forces must also recover their strength, otherwise how will they resist the demon seeds in the future. []

They don't want to rely on Ye Tian forever, and they don't want to rely on Ye Tian all the time.

For them, relying on a middle-level realm god is a very helpless thing, if their own strength is enough, they naturally have to rely on themselves!

......

Since the silent period of the Eastern Wu Realm Gap Realm arrived, Ye Tian also left here and returned to the Terran Holy Kingdom.

During this period of time, he was also silently cultivating, refining his eternal Dao seed and improving his strength.

However, after a period of time, Dongwu Guzong came to him, and this time it was a good thing.

Dongwu Ancient Sect.

Ye Tian came here, and at this time, the Guya Realm God of the Dongwu Ancient Sect was discussing a matter with him.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God!"

"God of the Ancient Realm!"

They greeted each other.

The Guya Realm God opened his mouth and said: "Ye Tianjie God, this time I am looking for you, there is a good matter to discuss with you, the Dongwu Realm of our Dongwu Realm is in a period of silence, which leads to the pressure of other Realm Seam Realms. In fact, it was also the other realms that entered a period of silence at the beginning, which caused the pressure on our Eastern Wu Realm Gaps to skyrocket. Now, our Eastern Wu Boundary Seam Realm has survived the crisis, but some Boundary Seam Realm has fallen into a bitter battle, and even needs to call for help. This time, a Boundary Seam Realm is asking for help, and I want you and some middle-level realm gods in the Dongwu Realm to come over and help, and take the opportunity to ask for some benefits. "

"Claim benefits!"

Ye Tian was a little moved, and immediately said, "I want some Black Leaf Demon Gold, this shouldn't be a difficult thing, right?"

The Gu Ya Realm God smiled and said: "It's just Black Leaf Demon Gold, naturally it's not a difficult thing, if the Ye Heaven Realm God helps them solve the crisis, no matter how much Black Leaf Demon Gold they have, they are willing to take it out." "

"Okay, then trouble the gods of the Guya Realm to talk to them, and once they agree, I will immediately go to help. Ye Tian assured.

He didn't think about trading with the other party alone, and people wouldn't agree.

After all, he is not a top force, and he is not even qualified to contact the other party.

Therefore, this matter still has to be brought forward by the high-level realm gods of the ancient Ya realm gods and their top forces, and he can't avoid it.
